name: customgpt-ai-rag
description: Give Claude Code persistent semantic search over your entire project — even 10,000 files — using CustomGPT.ai's RAG engine. Index your codebase, documents, or any file collection once, then ask questions across everything instantly. No context overflow, no re-reading files. Use /create-agent to index a folder, /query-agent to search it, and /refresh-agent to keep it current. Requires only curl — no Node.js, no Python, no dependencies.
